organisation.name: The British Pain Society
organisation.overview: The British Pain Society (BPS) is the UK’s largest multidisciplinary professional organisation dedicated to improving pain care.

membership.description: Members span medicine, health, and research.
membership.sharedCommitment: Advancing pain care through education, advocacy, and collaboration.

missionAndVision.vision: Helping people live well with pain.
coreFocus: Building professional capacity through resources and training
Advocating for pain recognition as a major public health issue

approach.collaboration: Working closely with people living with pain to ensure lived experience shapes priorities and impact.
approach.partnerships: Developing strong partnerships to support innovation and raise standards of care.
approach.equity: Championing equitable access to effective pain management across the UK.
